sections.title: Justified Spendings - Absolute Priority Relics
sections.subtitle: These relics are aimed to help in you most all-around content as possible

relics.name: Genesis Tree
relics.notes: Required for the PvP dominance, an absolute priority whenever it shows up.

relics.name: Planar Gate
relics.notes: Less powerful in PvP than the Tree but still great nonetheless. Slightly stronger in PvE than the Tree.

relics.name: Pharaoh's Sarcophagus
relics.notes: Should stay at below 5-stars due to negative damage at above (unless spender). Should be your first relic to 2-stars.

relics.name: Kusanagi
relics.notes: PvE Powerhouse, PvP Monarch Killer. Pick it up as fast as possible to 2-stars.

relics.name: Flame Banner
relics.notes: Solid in the PvP but a must have in the Lost City for sustain
relics.source: Last Week of the Season In the Relic Rebate

relics.name: Cosmic Mirror (Telescope)
relics.notes: Top tier in PvP + PvE, as many DPS heroes are Demons, this relic just performs miracles, even out-doing the Sarcophagus at times. Get it after your Babylon becomes online (8/9-stars)

sections.title: Rebates & Extra Sources
sections.subtitle: These relics are mostly for the PvP but are also helpful in PvE

relics.name: Magatama
relics.notes: 3-stars for PvE although it has been irrelevant for a while. 6 -> 8-stars for the PvP destruction. Not sure if it's worthy of building up to 6/8-stars as F2P.
relics.source: Last Week of the Season In the Relic Rebate

relics.name: Forbidden Chest
relics.notes: Best relic when it comes to attacking side for PvP, entirely disrupts the relic energy of the opponent's team. If you care for PvP, this relic will be a must.

relics.name: Knight's Edge
relics.notes: Cheap & Effective, don't get from the Rebate, get from other sources.

relics.name: Lance
relics.notes: It's best when paired with a 3-round Chrono relic for max increase in the combo actions from your allies. Worth picking up when you've done the above relics.

relics.name: Exorcism Cauldron
relics.notes: Just needs 2-stars for a full current round immunity (the round it casts). Get it when going for PvP.

relics.name: Gleipnir
relics.notes: Get it once you've some free time, overall works at 3 but is weird to use, perfect at 5 and 7. Mainly used for the Speed advantage and Ultimates in R1.

relics.name: Ocean's Maw
relics.notes: Not too big of a priority, but it's pretty fair relic both PvP and PvE wise. Exceptional in the Crusades that are during 2nd and 6th week of the season.

sections.title: Extras/Rebates - PvP Road
sections.subtitle: When you start doing PvP as the PvE contest vanishes

relics.name: Crown of Purity
relics.notes: PvP beast, 3-round cooldown reset, Seal being the most broken debuff, absolutely worth going for Ethereals or Mystifiers.

relics.name: Hannya Mask
relics.notes: Strong but requires 7-stars and ideally pairing with the Planar Gate. Not recommended unless you can get it fast to 7.

relics.name: Call of the Sea Origin
relics.notes: A key relic for the Dooms, work on it simultaneously as you're building your Dooms team.
relics.source: Relic Rebate / Shops / Low Tier Chests

relics.name: Crown of Schemes
relics.notes: Strong offensive relic, peaks at 9-stars, has stun and extending stuns could be very usable. Works in PvE as well due to strong debuff conversion.

relics.name: Vanquisher
relics.notes: It's a long road starting this relic because it does need 8-stars to be reliable.
relics.source: Relic Rebate / Shops / Low Tier Chests

relics.name: Python's Mirror
relics.notes: Very strong relic that's worth working towards with lower tier chests. As it's very unique in terms of resurrections and could change the outcome of the fight.
relics.source: Relic Rebate / Shops / Low Tier Chests

relics.name: Bloodrift Blade
relics.notes: Nice to have but overall not much of a priority to build it, but its effects could have a bright future ahead.

relics.name: Divine Scepter
relics.notes: Recently changed to no longer cleanse Lucifer. So this relic became one of the worst ones.

relics.name: Hand of Tyr
relics.notes: Easy to get & pretty strong, 3 round cooldown, get it to 3-stars and forget about it.
relics.source: Relic Rebate / Shops / Low Tier Chests

relics.name: Underworld Key
relics.notes: PvP Niche, usable because of a stun + instant 100 energy regen, but the HP% effect is minimal.

relics.name: Thunderbelt
relics.notes: I wouldn't pick it up, doesn't feel that powerful late-game.

sections.title: Too Niche / Low Priority
sections.subtitle: Either are outdated or are too low of a priority to put your main focus on

relics.name: Zephyr Spear
relics.notes: Doubt anyone new will ever built it because it's just too outdated, oldies have it because it was the very first 100 energy relic, so still usable for the same reason on the Avengers.

relics.name: Frostclaw
relics.notes: Solid filler relic but requires high investment & is hard to justify due to its "mid" effect.

relics.name: Tempest Hammer
relics.notes: Usable at PvP for the Dooms, hard to justify spending any resources that have other, better relics as options.
relics.source: Relic Rebate / Shops / Low Tier Chests

relics.name: Svalin's Shield
relics.notes: Solid with Lamia and without her usable on bulky Dooms that need HP.
relics.source: Relic Rebate / Shops / Low Tier Chests

relics.name: Cosmic Gourd
relics.notes: Too niche but solid, requires heavy investment, works with Wukong but not so reliable to justify the investment, more of a "fun" relic.

relics.name: Crimson Crown
relics.notes: Too niche of usage and very special energy recovery, can be good with decent planning around it.
relics.source: Relic Rebate / Shops / Low Tier Chests

relics.name: Famine's Scales
relics.notes: Solid to get to 3-stars via cheap relic selectors, as it's a 3 round cooldown relic and also usable with bunch of Ethereals.
relics.source: Relic Rebate / Shops / Low Tier Chests

relics.name: Plague Bow
relics.notes: Solid at 3-stars to fill synergy until you get better relics, not a priority.
relics.source: Relic Rebate / Shops / Low Tier Chests

relics.name: Laevateinn
relics.notes: Requires 9-stars for the instant silence but hardly justified to get it.
relics.source: Relic Rebate / Shops / Low Tier Chests

relics.name: Umbra's Torch
relics.notes: Bad in the seasonal PvP because of the Fortitude effect being nerfed by the Execute & hard to justify investing for 'non' seasonal content.

relics.name: Judgment Blades
relics.notes: Execute part is useless due to pet (Phoenix) and (Vals) synergy. Outdated but usable in the Relic Abyss Crusades.
relics.source: Relic Rebate / Shops / Low Tier Chests

relics.name: Demonbane Whip
relics.notes: Not so usable anymore as more, better relics have been released, solid filler if you get it for free.
relics.source: Relic Rebate / Shops / Low Tier Chests

relics.name: Death's Scythe
relics.notes: Outdated, don't get it.
relics.source: Relic Rebate / Shops / Low Tier Chests

relics.name: RA's Barque
relics.notes: Don't get it

relics.name: Divine Plume
relics.notes: Don't get it

relics.name: Stardust Sphere
relics.notes: Don't get it
relics.source: Relic Rebate / Shops / Low Tier Chests

relics.name: Nightstalker
relics.notes: Don't get it

relics.name: Dragonblood Roar
relics.notes: Don't get it
